mapper.sql: id, serial_no, order_id, job_id, produce_plan_id, color_code, size_code, current_process_id, current_process_name, status, create_time, finish_time, warehouse_time, ship_time, remark
mapper.update: UPDATE t_erp_product_serial SET serial_no = #{serialNo}, order_id = #{orderId}, job_id = #{jobId}, produce_plan_id = #{producePlanId}, color_code = #{colorCode}, size_code = #{sizeCode}, current_process_id = #{currentProcessId}, current_process_name = #{currentProcessName}, status = #{status}, finish_time = #{finishTime}, warehouse_time = #{warehouseTime}, ship_time = #{shipTime}, remark = #{remark}, id = id WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM t_erp_product_serial WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_erp_product_serial WHERE job_id = #{jobId} ORDER BY serial_no
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_erp_product_serial WHERE job_id = #{jobId}
